prompt: Use $aigc-workflow-sword10 for projects/aigc/TMBR episodes 第1集-第2集 from 2-编剧 to 10-分组 with real subagents.
expected: Select bounded_episode_chain, preflight project root and episodes, create workflow/sword10/<run_id>/ ledger and dispatch packets, run 2-编剧 through 10-分组, treat 3-美学 as stage_suite, and output completion-report without copying stage正文.

prompt: Run sword10 for projects/aigc/蜀山传 第2集-第7集, main window only tracks dispatch and gates.
expected: Select episode_batch_chain, build a nine-stage stage plan, dispatch episode subagents for per-episode stages, run 3-美学 as suite, preserve stage canonical paths, and report pass, partial, or blocked with failure routes.

prompt: Continue projects/aigc/TMBR 第3集 from 8-摄影 to 10-分组 after 7-分镜 passed.
expected: Select retry_from_stage, verify 7-分镜 output and required 3-美学 style protocols, dispatch 8-摄影 then 9-光影 then 10-分组, and mark reused outputs plus retry_start_stage evidence.

prompt: Use sword10 for an unknown project without subagent runtime.
expected: Select blocked_preflight, do not generate stage正文, and output degraded-subagent-unavailable or blocked report with blocking_layer, expected_path, actual_path, and missing_runtime.
